person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
CHILDREN AND PARENTS:	
Son of Jean I, Baron de Ligne and Isabella van Strijen, Dame van Zevenbergen
Husband of Margareta van Gavere & Jeanne de Condé
Father of Alix de Ligne, dame de Montreuil; Jeanne de Ligne; Marguerite de Conde; Guillaume I, Baron de Ligne; Jeanne de Ligne; Catherine de Ligne, Dame de Bailleul; Robert de Ligne; Jean de Ligne; Michel I, baron de Ligne; Elise de Ligne; Nicolas de Ligne, Seigneur d'Ollignies and Marie de Ligne, Dame de Tilleur// Brother of Catherine de Ligne; Michel de Ligne, Seigneur du Ponthoir; Mathieu, Baron de Ligne and Jean de Ligne. https://www.geni.com/people/Fastre-II-Baron-de-Ligne.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Ollignies於1280年出生在比利時納姆爾利尼時，他的父親Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut.30歲，母親Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergen20歲。他於1306年與Jeanne de Condé結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1337年12月28日在義大利維圖維其亞享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Ollignies于1280年出生在比利时納姆爾利尼时，他的父亲Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut.30岁，母亲Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergen20岁。他于1306年与Jeanne de Condé结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1337年12月28日在意大利維圖維其亞享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Ligne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from Old French vi(g)ne ‘vineyard’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived near a vineyard or a metonymic occupational name for a vine dresser or the owner of a vineyard. See also Lavigne .
History: This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Lavigne
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Marcel, Normand, Lucien, Emile, Gilles, Francois, Germain, Michel, Ovila.

from Old French vi(g)ne ‘vineyard’ (from Latin vinea, a derivative of vinum ‘wine’), hence a topographic name for someone who lived near a vineyard or a metonymic occupational name for a vine dresser or the owner of a vineyard (compare Vigne ). It is formed with fused feminine definite article la.

nameMeanings.name: Fastré
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Cesar, Juan, Joaquin, Manuel, Alfonso, Anselmo, Armando, Carlos, Domingo, Enrique, Fernando.
Catalan and Spanish: occupational name from sastre ‘tailor’ (from Latin sartor).

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Ollignies was born in 1280, in Ligny, Namur, Belgium, his father, Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut., was 30 and his mother, Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergen, was 20. He married Jeanne de Condé in 1306. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 28 December 1337, in Venice, Veneto, Italy, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Ollignies est né en 1280, à Ligny, Namur, Belgique, son père, Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut., avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergen, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Condé en 1306. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 28 décembre 1337, à Venezia, Veneto, Italie, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Ollignies 1280 in Ligny, Namen, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut. 30 und seine Mutter Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergen 20. Er hat 1306 Jeanne de Condé geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Dezember 1337 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Venezia, Veneto, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Ollignies è nato il nel 1280 nel Ligny, Namur, Belgio, il suo padre, Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut., aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergen, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Condé nel 1306. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 dicembre 1337, nel Venezia, Veneto, Italia, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Olligniesが1280年にベルギーナムルリグニーで生まれた時，父Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut.は30歳，母Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergenは20歳であった。1306年にJeanne de Condéと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1337年12月28日にイタリアベンエトーベンエズアで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Ollignies(이)가 1280년 벨기에 남어 리그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut.(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergen(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1306년 Jeanne de Condé(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1337년 12월 28일 이탈리아 븐토 븐지아에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Ollignies nasceu em 1280, em Ligny, Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut., tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergen, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Condé em 1306. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de dezembro de 1337, em Venezia, Veneto, Itália, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Ollignies родился в 1280 г. в местности лигни, намур, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut. было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergen, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Condé в 1306 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 28 декабря 1337 г. в местности винезя, винето, Италия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baron Fastré van Ligne Heer van Ollignies nació en 1280, en Ligny, Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Baron Johan I van Ligne Heer van Ollignies en Maulde-Sus-Escaut., tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elisabeth van Strijen Vrouwe van Zevenbergen, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Condé en 1306. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de diciembre de 1337, en Venezia, Veneto, Italia, a la edad de 57 años.
